CVE-2015-5522.title: Heap-based buffer overflow in the ParseValue function in lexer.c  ...
CVE-2015-5522.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in the ParseValue function in lexer.c in tidy before 4.9.31 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via vectors involving a command character in an href.

CVE-2015-5523.title: The ParseValue function in lexer.c in tidy before 4.9.31 allows r ...
CVE-2015-5523.description: The ParseValue function in lexer.c in tidy before 4.9.31 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via vectors involving multiple whitespace characters before an empty href, which triggers a large memory allocation.
